name: animation
description: Parent animation agent — generates and manages animations. Delegates Remotion video rendering to remotion sub-agent and Lottie animation work to lottie sub-agent.

skills.name: generate-storyboard
skills.description: Generates an animation storyboard from a text description

parameters.description: string — what the animation should convey

skills.name: select-library
skills.description: Recommends best animation library (Framer Motion, GSAP, Lottie, CSS) for a given use case

subAgents.name: remotion
subAgents.description: Programmatic React video rendering — compositions, sequences, transitions, overlays, audio sync, Lambda deployment

subAgents.name: lottie
subAgents.description: Lottie/Bodymovin animations — export from After Effects, optimize JSON, render in web/mobile
